meta.question: Where is the APS Black Box Specificaton located in the package heirarchy?
meta.finalAnswer:
The APS Black Box Specification is located in the following package hierarchy:

**TMT → Project → Work Packages → Telescope → WorkPackages → Control → Alignment and Phasing System → Systems Engineering → 01 Components → Operational → APS → Black Box Specification**

This is a package element (vocab:package) in the SysML model. The full qualified name is:
`TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Black Box Specification`

The package contains 3 nested packages and 3 packaged elements (as shown by its properties), and is part of the Alignment and Phasing System (APS) component within the TMT project structure.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Black Box Specification"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found multiple "Black Box" elements. Need to explore the specific "APS Black Box Specification" element to determine its exact package hierarchy location.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS::Black%20Box%20Specification"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name ?owner ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "Black%20Box%20Specification" .
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
}
LIMIT 25

  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .

  ?elem vocab:Element_owner ?owner .

}
